race.comment: TANGO RHYTHM (8) gets the blinkers on first time today as she returns for a new stable. Her form last campaign makes for good reading, albeit over further. Those figures stack right up though and if she can return in similar form, she'll be hard to hold out. DIXIE PRINCESS (6) finished seventh over 1200m at Geraldton at her most recent appearance on April 9. Has ability and should be right in the finish. PLACID ROM (5) won a trial here before tackling the 1200m journey first-up where he led and tired to be 4.2L off the winner. Back to 1000m looks a good move and it wouldn't surprise to see him improve sharply. THE SESSIONE (3) finished out of the money two starts back then was beaten 5 lengths when fifth in a 1600m contest at this track nine days ago. Suitably placed so anticipating a big run this time. COSTA STAR (7) was prominent in the run and gave a big sight when third over 1600m at this track just nine days ago. Has a wide gate to overcome but is a live chance.
